    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift: the output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the chunked-attention mechanism rather than downstream-harm avoidance and provenance.",

    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced."
